description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and foregrip, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, providing a comfortable shoulder rest, while the foregrip is squared and matches the wood grain of the stock. The receiver is boxy and houses a visible trigger guard and magazine well, with a detachable box magazine inserted. The barrel is medium length and ends with a small cylindrical muzzle device, likely a flash hider. Iron sights are mounted on top of the receiver and barrel, providing basic aiming capability. The overall appearance suggests a historical or vintage submachine gun, reminiscent of the Thompson or similar models, often seen in urban or law enforcement contexts.
description: A vintage-style rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, black metal receiver, and iron sights, featuring a detachable box magazine and a flash hider at the barrel tip.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle, flash hider, and a narrow profile of the wooden foregrip and stock.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, foregrip, black metal receiver, trigger, and the detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the end of the wooden stock and the narrow profile of the receiver and barrel, with the iron sight visible on top.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock, foregrip, black receiver, trigger, and magazine, with slight differences in visible controls.
